records.question: How many bookings with at least 3 products booked and a discount of at least 48.73 have a status date on or after 2018-03-22 00:16:58 and ended on or after 2017-10-02 07:28:09?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id FROM bookings
JOIN products_booked ON bookings.booking_id = products_booked.booking_id
JOIN view_product_availability ON bookings.booking_id = view_product_availability.booking_id
WHERE products_booked.booked_count >= 3 AND bookings.amount_of_discount >= 48.73 AND view_product_availability.status_date >= '2018-03-22 00:16:58' AND bookings.booking_end_date >= '2017-10-02 07:28:09'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id
FROM bookings
WHERE bookings.amount_of_discount >= 48.73
  AND bookings.booking_end_date >= '2017-10-02 07:28:09'
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM products_booked
      WHERE products_booked.booking_id = bookings.booking_id
        AND products_booked.booked_count >= 3
  )
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM view_product_availability
      WHERE view_product_availability.booking_id = bookings.booking_id
        AND view_product_availability.status_date >= '2018-03-22 00:16:58'
  )

records.question: Which bookings have a refund amount at most 143.99, where count_hired is 499, made by female customers with the last name Crona who became customers exactly on 2017-07-27 08:04:22?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id FROM bookings
JOIN customers ON bookings.customer_id = customers.customer_id
WHERE customers.date_became_customer = '2017-07-27 08:04:22' AND bookings.amount_of_refund <= 143.99 AND bookings.count_hired = '499' AND customers.gender_mf = '0' AND customers.last_name = 'Crona'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id
FROM bookings
JOIN customers ON bookings.customer_id = customers.customer_id
WHERE bookings.amount_of_refund <= 143.99
  AND bookings.count_hired = '499'
  AND customers.date_became_customer = '2017-07-27 08:04:22'
  AND customers.gender_mf = '0'
  AND customers.last_name = 'Crona'

records.question: How many bookings started on or after 2017-05-24 16:16:29 and ended on or after 2018-03-07 17:39:04, with no damage returned, an amount payable of at most 374.59, and an amount of refund at most 130.87, made by male customers named Terry who became customers on or before 2015-05-05 20:29:01?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id FROM bookings
JOIN customers ON bookings.customer_id = customers.customer_id
WHERE bookings.amount_of_refund <= 130.87 AND customers.date_became_customer <= '2015-05-05 20:29:01' AND customers.gender_mf = '1' AND bookings.booking_start_date >= '2017-05-24 16:16:29' AND bookings.amount_payable <= 374.59 AND customers.last_name = 'Terry' AND bookings.returned_damaged_yn = '0' AND bookings.booking_end_date >= '2018-03-07 17:39:04'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id
FROM bookings
WHERE bookings.amount_of_refund <= 130.87
  AND bookings.booking_start_date >= '2017-05-24 16:16:29'
  AND bookings.amount_payable <= 374.59
  AND bookings.returned_damaged_yn = '0'
  AND bookings.booking_end_date >= '2018-03-07 17:39:04'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM customers
    WHERE customers.customer_id = bookings.customer_id
      AND customers.date_became_customer <= '2015-05-05 20:29:01'
      AND customers.gender_mf = '1'
      AND customers.last_name = 'Terry'
  )

records.question: Which bookings have been returned damaged and have an outstanding amount exactly equal to 56.02?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id FROM bookings
WHERE bookings.returned_damaged_yn = '1' AND bookings.amount_outstanding = 56.02
records.pred_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id
FROM bookings
WHERE returned_damaged_yn = '1' AND amount_outstanding = 56.02

records.question: What bookings have an amount of discount exactly equal to 61.55?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id FROM bookings
JOIN customers ON bookings.customer_id = customers.customer_id
WHERE bookings.amount_of_discount = 61.55
records.pred_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id
FROM bookings
JOIN customers ON bookings.customer_id = customers.customer_id
WHERE bookings.amount_of_discount = 61.55

records.question: Which bookings have an amount payable of at most 273.28, ended on or after 2017-10-02 07:28:09, were returned damaged, have a booking status code of Provisional, count hired of 488, an amount of discount exactly 48.73, amount outstanding exactly 73.88, and an amount of refund at most 181.19?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id FROM bookings
WHERE bookings.amount_payable <= 273.28 AND bookings.booking_end_date >= '2017-10-02 07:28:09' AND bookings.returned_damaged_yn = '1' AND bookings.booking_status_code = 'Provisional' AND bookings.count_hired = '488' AND bookings.amount_of_discount = 48.73 AND bookings.amount_outstanding = 73.88 AND bookings.amount_of_refund <= 181.19
records.pred_sql:
SELECT booking_id
FROM Bookings
WHERE amount_payable <= 273.28
  AND booking_end_date >= '2017-10-02 07:28:09'
  AND returned_damaged_yn = '1'
  AND booking_status_code = 'Provisional'
  AND count_hired = '488'
  AND amount_of_discount = 48.73
  AND amount_outstanding = 73.88
  AND amount_of_refund <= 181.19

records.question: Which bookings have an amount of refund at most 161.9 and have related customers and products booked?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id FROM bookings
JOIN customers ON bookings.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN products_booked ON bookings.booking_id = products_booked.booking_id
WHERE bookings.amount_of_refund <= 161.9
records.pred_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id
FROM bookings
JOIN customers ON bookings.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN products_booked ON bookings.booking_id = products_booked.booking_id
WHERE bookings.amount_of_refund <= 161.9
GROUP BY bookings.booking_id

records.question: What bookings with a booking status code of Provisional have an amount outstanding exactly 36.79 and a booking end date on or before 2018-03-04 21:42:45?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id FROM bookings
WHERE bookings.amount_outstanding = 36.79 AND bookings.booking_status_code = 'Provisional' AND bookings.booking_end_date <= '2018-03-04 21:42:45'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT booking_id
FROM Bookings
WHERE amount_outstanding = 36.79
  AND booking_status_code = 'Provisional'
  AND booking_end_date <= '2018-03-04 21:42:45'

records.question: What bookings have a Provisional status with an amount payable of 306.26, made by good male customers who received at least 78.31 in discount, and had payments of at most 307.14 on or before 2018-03-03 14:22:51?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id FROM bookings
JOIN customers ON bookings.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN payments ON bookings.booking_id = payments.booking_id
WHERE payments.payment_date <= '2018-03-03 14:22:51' AND bookings.amount_of_discount >= 78.31 AND customers.good_or_bad_customer = 'good' AND payments.amount_paid <= 307.14 AND customers.gender_mf = '1' AND bookings.booking_status_code = 'Provisional' AND bookings.amount_payable = 306.26
records.pred_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id
FROM bookings
JOIN customers ON bookings.customer_id = customers.customer_id
WHERE bookings.amount_of_discount >= 78.31
  AND bookings.booking_status_code = 'Provisional'
  AND bookings.amount_payable = 306.26
  AND customers.good_or_bad_customer = 'good'
  AND customers.gender_mf = '1'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM payments
    WHERE payments.booking_id = bookings.booking_id
      AND payments.payment_date <= '2018-03-03 14:22:51'
      AND payments.amount_paid <= 307.14
  )

records.question: Which bookings ended exactly on 2017-12-02 00:37:00 for customers whose last name is Strosin?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id FROM bookings
JOIN customers ON bookings.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN discount_coupons ON customers.coupon_id = discount_coupons.coupon_id
WHERE customers.last_name = 'Strosin' AND bookings.booking_end_date = '2017-12-02 00:37:00'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id
FROM bookings
JOIN customers ON bookings.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN discount_coupons ON customers.coupon_id = discount_coupons.coupon_id
WHERE bookings.booking_end_date = '2017-12-02 00:37:00'
  AND customers.last_name = 'Strosin'
